description: MCP server for Argo RPG Platform — connects AI assistants to campaign data via OAuth2
name: io.github.Argo-RPG-Platform/argo-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Argo OAuth2 access token from the consent flow at https://app.argo.games/oauth2/mcp-connect
environmentVariables.name: OAUTH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Argo OAuth2 refresh token. Enables automatic renewal of the access token when it expires (~1 hour).
environmentVariables.name: REFRESH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Override the Argo WebAPI base URL. Defaults to https://api.argo.games.
environmentVariables.name: ARGO_API_BASE
